info.title: Environment Configurations API
info.description: REST endpoints for managing environment (stage) configurations in ODC. Covers custom domains, IP filters, and Private Gateways, enabling you to automate the same configurations available in ODC Portal.

servers.description: Replace ODC_PORTAL_DOMAIN with the domain of your organization.
Replace {odc-portal-domain} with the domain of your organization.

delete.summary: Deletes a domain from an environment (stage).
delete.description:
Deletes a domain from an environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).
delete.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).

get.summary: Returns the details of a specific domain for the given environment (stage).
get.description:
Returns the details of a specific domain for the given environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).
get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

patch.summary: Patches the default app (App Domain) for the specified custom domain.
patch.description:
Patches the default app (App Domain) for the specified custom domain.

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).

requestBody.description: The patch request containing the application key and redirect option.

patch.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).

get.summary: Returns a list of domains for a specific environment (stage).
get.description:
Returns a list of domains for a specific environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Allowed values: 1 to 100. Default value: 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the first result to return. Default value: 0.

get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

post.summary: Creates a new domain for the specified environment (stage). You can provide the domain's hostname and name.
post.description:
Creates a new domain for the specified environment (stage). You can provide the domain's hostname and name.

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).

requestBody.description: The domain object with the necessary information

post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).

get.summary: Retrieves the default domain for the given environment (stage).
get.description:
Retrieves the default domain for the given environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).
get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

patch.summary: Updates the default domain for the given environment (stage).
patch.description:
Updates the default domain for the given environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).

requestBody.description: The request object containing the new Default Domain.

patch.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage custom domains** permission for the target environment (stage).

delete.summary: Deletes a specific IP filter group for an environment (stage).
delete.description:
Deletes a specific IP filter group for an environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage IP filters** permission for the target environment (stage).
delete.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage IP filters** permission for the target environment (stage).

get.summary: Returns information about a specific IP filter group for an environment (stage).
get.description:
Returns information about a specific IP filter group for an environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).
get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

patch.summary: Updates an IP filter group for an environment (stage).
patch.description:
Updates an IP filter group for an environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage IP filters** permission for the target environment (stage).

requestBody.description: The details of the IP filter group being updated.

patch.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage IP filters** permission for the target environment (stage).

get.summary: Returns the list of IP filter groups for an environment (stage).
get.description:
Returns the list of IP filter groups for an environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

parameters.name: appKeys
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of app keys to filter the results.

get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

post.summary: Creates a new IP filter group in an environment (stage).
post.description:
Creates a new IP filter group in an environment (stage).

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage IP filters** permission for the target environment (stage).

requestBody.description: The details of the new IP filter group.

post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage IP filters** permission for the target environment (stage).

post.description:
Activates a private gateway.

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage private gateways** permission for the target environment (stage).
post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage private gateways** permission for the target environment (stage).

post.description:
Deactivates a private gateway.

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage private gateways** permission for the target environment (stage).
post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage private gateways** permission for the target environment (stage).

get.description:
Gets the private gateway status.

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).
get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission for the target environment (stage).

post.description:
Rotates the private gateway key.

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage private gateways** permission for the target environment (stage).
post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Manage private gateways** permission for the target environment (stage).

name.description: The name of the IP filter group.

description.description: The description of the IP filter group.

accessType.description: The default access type of the IP filter group, after all rules are applied.

ipRules.description: The list of IP filter rules associated with this group.

appKeys.description: The list of all app keys that are explicitly assigned to this group.

defaultDomain.description: The default domain for the given environment (stage).

hostname.description: The hostname used to access the applications that are deployed in the environment.

cNameValue.description: The CName related to the domain.

builtIn.description: Indicates if the domain is provided by OutSystems.

certificate.description: The associated certificate for the domain.

isDefault.description: Indicates if this domain is set as the default one for applications in the environment (stage).

defaultApplicationKey.description: If this domain is set as the default one for this application key in that environment

redirectOption.description:
The type of redirect to use, enum of [Permanent, Temporary, None]
Default is Permanent (301) redirect.

statusErrorCode.description: Associated error value for when the status is in Error

statusErrorMessage.description: Associated error message for when the status is in Error

DomainPagedListResponse.description: Represents a response containing a paged set of results.

defaultApplicationKey.description: The application key to set as the default for the domain.

redirectOption.description:
The type of redirect to use, enum of [Permanent, Temporary, None]
Default is Permanent (301) redirect.

domain.description: The updated domain information after the patch operation

hostname.description: The hostname for the new domain.

name.description: The name for the new domain.
The name of the IP filter group.

description.description: The description of the IP filter group.

accessType.description: The default access type of the IP filter group, after all rules are applied.

ipRules.description: The list of IP filter rules associated with this group.

appKeys.description: The list of all app keys that are explicitly assigned to this group.

key.description: The unique identifier of the IP filter group.
The key identifier of the Ip filter group

name.description: The name of the IP rule.

ranges.description: The list of the IP ranges (e.g: 0.0.0.0-0.0.0.3).

isActive.description: Indicates if the IP rule is currently active.

results.description: The list of IP filter groups.

count.description: Number of results in the current page.

offset.description: Offset of the current page of results.

nextPageOffset.description: Offset of the next page of results.

PageInfoWithTotals.description: Contains response page information including totals.

defaultDomain.description: The default domain to set for the environment (stage).

accessType.description: Default access type in group, after all rules are applied

ipRules.description: All the rules associated with this group

appKeys.description: List of all applications that are explicitly assigned to this group.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

status.description: The HTTP status code applicable to the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation of the error.

instance.description: A URI that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

traceId.description: This field helps OutSystems support track and investigate specific error occurrences. Providing this identifier when reporting an issue allows for more precise and faster troubleshooting.

errorCode.description: This error code serves the purpose to communicate with OutSystems Support and help diagnose errors.

ProblemDetails.description: A standardized error response as per RFC 7807 (Problem Details for HTTP APIs).

RedirectOption.description: The type of redirect to use for domains.

serverActive.description: Indicates if the private gateway service is active.

serverHealth.description: Indicates the health status of the private gateway.

isDeactivating.description: Indicates if the private gateway is in the process of deactivating.

url.description: The url value to connect to the private gateway.

authToken.description: The authentication token for the private gateway.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format 'Bearer {token}'

tags.name: IP filters
tags.description: Create, update, and delete IP filter groups and rules.

tags.name: Private gateways
tags.description: Activate, deactivate, and manage private gateways.
